{"command": "git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(wiki): add audio/video inline playback via Release-based CI download

- Deploy workflow downloads audio-assets-v1 + video-assets-v1 tarballs
- Page generators detect local OGG/MP4 files for inline <audio>/<video> players
- Falls back to GitHub Release download links when no local files exist
- download_wiki_assets.sh supports --all/--art/--media flags
- .gitignore updated for audio/ and video/ directories

https://claude.ai/code/session_01...
